##NAMES=Clinoatacamite
##RRUFFID=R100198
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Cu_2_Cl(OH)_3_
##LOCALITY=La Vendida mine, Caracoles, Sierra Gorda District, Tocopilla Province, Antofagasta Region, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Lighter green thin tabular crystals forming v-twins perched on darker green blocky atacamite, associated with black paratacamite. Twinned by 120 deg rotation around [2 0 1]
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R100198
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Cu_1.95_Ni_0.02_Co_0.01_)Cl_1.04_(OH)_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.145 b: 6.837 c: 9.159 alpha: 90 beta: 99.56 gamma: 90 volume: 379.42 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
